arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Rangers simulated to predict big Europa League clash
arts.sum: Manchester United face Rangers in the Europa League later today, so we simulated the game to predict what could happen.

arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo ‘insistence’ can see player leave Manchester United – Lobbying for transfer
arts.sum: Earlier this month, journalist Bruno Andrade stated Manchester United’s Casemiro could be on his way to Saudi Arabia in the winter market. Casemiro started against Newcastle United since Manuel Ugarte was serving a suspension, and it was his only league start since December 1st. arts.ttl: Lindelof, Shaw, Mount - Manchester United injury news and return dates ahead of Rangers clash
arts.sum: All the very latest on the Man United injury front ahead of Thursday night's Europa League clash with Rangers at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Marcus Rashford receives CRUSHING message
arts.sum: Rashford has not played a single minute for Man Utd since being dropped for the away fixture against Manchester City in the Premier League and has appeared on the bench only once during that time. Despite the winger being left out of the squad in four successive matches, Fati, who has also been linked with a move to Man Utd, has told head coach Hansi Flick that he intends to remain at the club until at least the summer, Mundo Deportivo reports.

arts.ttl: Man United legend reveals why Ruben Amorim is NOT to blame for their demise - despite downturn in form after Erik ten Hag's sacking
arts.sum: Amorim has won just three of his 11 Premier League games in charge of the Red Devils since taking the job in November, picking up 11 points. Ten Hag had tallied 15 points in 11 games.

arts.ttl: Europa League permutations: What Manchester United need to qualify for knockout stages
arts.sum: Scottish giants Rangers visit Old Trafford in a ‘Battle of Britain’

arts.ttl: 'I came from the street' - former Manchester United star Patrice Evra launching exciting new app
arts.sum: Former Man Utd defender Patrice Evra is a co-founder of PLAYER, a new concept that intends to change football.

arts.ttl: Transfer news LIVE: Arsenal make Sesko decision, Rashford suffers Man Utd blow, fresh Garnacho twist
arts.sum: Arsenal are ready to splash out on RB Leipzig striker Benjamin Sesko while there's been a change in Napoli's attempts to sign Alejandro Garnacho from Manchester United, who want to bring in Patrick Dorgu

arts.ttl: Man Utd beaten to Garnacho replacement by IPSWICH
arts.sum: Kieran McKenna, Ipswich’s manager and a previous coach at Man Utd, appears to have been crucial in the decision, with the 38-year-old manager having repeatedly called Enciso in an attempt to make his sign for Ipswich until the end of the season. Manchester United ’s miserable period goes on, with Ipswich Town now beating them to sign Julio Enciso from Brighton, a player Ruben Amorim’s side had lined up to replace the outgoing Alejandro Garnacho .
